ddls:
CREATE TABLE "business_entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business entity */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the business entity */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the business entity (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "incorporated" INTEGER /* Year the business entity was incorporated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the business entity */,
  "entity_type" TEXT /* Type of business entity (e.g., Corporation, Non-Profit, Partnership) */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry the business entity operates in */,
  "revenue" TEXT /* Annual revenue of the business entity */,
  "num_employees" INTEGER /* Number of employees in the business entity */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the business entity */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the business entity */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last update to the entity's information */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "key_people" (
  "person_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each key person */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business entity the person is associated with */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the key person */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the key person (e.g., President, Director) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date the person started in the role */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date the person ended in the role (if applicable) */,
  "email" TEXT /* Contact email of the key person */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the key person */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the key person */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if the person is currently in the role (true/false) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("person_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_key_people_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES business_entities ("entity_id")
)
